sections.paragraph:
συμβάλλω [σύν, βάλλω] the basic idea of ‘cast in with’ or ‘cast together’ underlies the varied usage of σ.

—1. ‘engage, in combative fashion’

—a. confront Lk 14:31.

—b. challenge in debate Lk 11:53 [54] v.l.

—2. ‘take up matters of mutual interest’, confer Ac 4:15; 17:18.

—3. ‘give thought to a medley of matters’, ponder Lk 2:19.

—4. ‘fall in with’, encounter Ac 20:14.

—5. ‘render assistance’, aid, help Ac 18:27.
